name: Fowl Affair
recipeIngredient: 3 Breasts of chicken, pheasant or grouse, split in half.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a roaster pan.
3. Sprinkle 2 cups of dry rice evenly across the bottom of the roaster.
4. Spoon the cream soups over the rice.
5. Pour hot water over the rice and soup; stir through.
6. Place the breast halves on top of the mixture.
7. Sprinkle parsley over the top.
8. Cover and bake in a 350-degree oven for 3 hours.
